### Checklist — SRS Compliance
- [ ] Functional requirements implemented (list FR IDs)
- [ ] Non-functional requirements met (performance, security, reliability)
- [ ] API contracts match SRS (input/output, envelopes)
- [ ] Data models/migrations align with SRS
- [ ] RLS and RBAC enforced per workspace/team
- [ ] Tests added and passing (unit/integration/e2e)
- [ ] Performance validated (<2s dashboard loads where applicable)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README/docs), cross-referencing SRS IDs
- [ ] Backward compatibility maintained or migration notes provided
